name: Elfengard Hunter Slayer
short_description: Welcome to the world of Elfengard. You will follow the journey to discover how the hero ended up in this fantasy world full of monsters.
detailed_description:
Welcome to the world of Elfengard.

You will be a young hero who ends up falling into this fantasy world full of monsters.
You will help a battalion that is facing these monsters while finding a way to return to your world. Create equipment and obtain resources to survive and face increasingly larger and more powerful monsters.
Become a captain of a batallion and face monsters in a battle turn strategy.

Key Features:
RPG, Survival, Craft, Class System.
